title: impatiens arriensii
intro: Impatiens arriensii, also known as Himalayan Balsam, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to have antiseptic and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Impatiens arriensii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
